# Data Protection Act 2018

Jurisdiction: Ireland
Region: IE
Citation: Data Protection Act 2018
Authority: Irish Statute Book / Data Protection Commission
Source URL: https://www.irishstatutebook.ie/eli/2018/act/7/enacted/en/html
Topics: lawful_basis, children_data, law_enforcement, data_subject_rights, accountability
Keywords: Ireland Data Protection Act 2018, DPC, GDPR implementation

## Summary
Ireland's data protection act implementing GDPR and the Law Enforcement Directive and establishing DPC powers.

## Key compliance obligations
- Apply Irish GDPR supplements and DPC procedural rules.
- Check Irish children's consent and public-interest provisions.
- Handle law-enforcement processing under Part 5 where relevant.
